title: nephrodium thwaitesii
intro: Nephrodium thwaitesii, commonly known as the Thwaites' maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antioxidant, which may help to protect against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of Nephrodium thwaitesii include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds.
